items.title: Violence erupts in Mexico after drug lord El Mencho killed
items.dek: The death of the most-wanted Jalisco cartel chief sparks retaliatory violence in at least a dozen states in Mexico.
items.body: The death of the most-wanted Jalisco cartel chief sparks retaliatory violence in at least a dozen states in Mexico.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Who was El Mencho, Mexico's most wanted man?
items.dek: The BBC's Will Grant examines the power wielded by the Jalisco drug cartel chief, who died after a clash with security forces assisted by US intelligence.
items.body: The BBC's Will Grant examines the power wielded by the Jalisco drug cartel chief, who died after a clash with security forces assisted by US intelligence.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kim Jong Un re-appointed leader of North Korea's ruling party
items.dek: The announcement by the rubber-stamp party congress comes as little surprise.
items.body: The announcement by the rubber-stamp party congress comes as little surprise.
items.author: IriLine Desk
